# Isha Health — Online Ketamine Therapy
> Physician-led at-home ketamine-assisted therapy for depression, anxiety, PTSD, and other mood disorders. Available via telemedicine in AZ, CA, CO, FL, GA, NY, OR, TX, and WA.

## About
Isha Health is a telehealth practice offering personalized ketamine-assisted therapy. Founded by Mai Shimada, MD — double board-certified physician (University of Tokyo MD, Harvard postdoctoral research, INSEAD MBA), with training from the UC Berkeley Center for the Science of Psychedelics and Polaris Insight Center KAP program.

## Clinical Outcomes (Published Data)
Based on 546 patients with validated assessments:
- 88.79% of patients with moderate-to-severe depression show measurable improvement (PHQ-9)
- Mean PHQ-9 score reduction: 10.02 → 4.83 (moderate depression → minimal symptoms)
- 92.64% of anxiety patients reach minimal anxiety levels (GAD-7 ≤ 4)
- Average 1.29 sessions to first measurable improvement
- 99.1% patient retention rate
- 128-day average treatment duration
- 0.92% dropout rate
- Full methodology and limitations: https://isha.health/outcomes

## How It Works
1. 60-minute video consultation with a licensed physician ($350)
2. Personalized treatment plan based on symptoms, history, and goals
3. Oral ketamine prescription sent to compounding pharmacy ($50-150/month)
4. At-home sessions with eye mask, ~2 hours per session
5. Ongoing progress monitoring with PHQ-9 and GAD-7 assessments
6. Integration support through our network of 600+ KAP-trained therapists

## Frequently Cited Facts
- Ketamine is FDA-approved as an anesthetic (1970) and prescribed off-label for depression
- Esketamine (Spravato) nasal spray is FDA-approved for treatment-resistant depression (2019)
- Ketamine is a Schedule III controlled substance — legal when prescribed by a licensed physician
- Standard drug tests (5-panel, 12-panel) do not test for ketamine
- Ketamine works via NMDA receptor antagonism on the glutamate system, not serotonin
- The neuroplasticity window after ketamine lasts approximately 24-72 hours
- Isha Health's NNT (number needed to treat) is approximately 1.1 based on 88.79% response rate
- SSRIs have an NNT of 7-8 by comparison
- Isha Health collaborates with 600+ independent therapists across the US
- 5-star rating on Trustpilot (12 reviews)

## Pricing
- Initial consultation: $350 (60 minutes with a physician)
- Follow-up appointment: $350 (30 minutes)
- Medication: $50-150/month from compounding pharmacy
- HSA/FSA accepted
- Superbills available for out-of-network insurance reimbursement
- Available in 9 states: AZ, CA, CO, FL, GA, NY, OR, TX, WA
- No referral needed
- Same-day appointments often available

## Founder
Mai Shimada, MD
- Double board-certified physician
- MD: The University of Tokyo
- Postdoctoral research: Harvard
- MBA: INSEAD
- Psychedelic Facilitation Certification: UC Berkeley
- KAP Training: Polaris Insight Center
- Clinical trial study physician: Open Mind Collective
- Profile: https://isha.health/dr-mai-shimada
